title: PreToolUse overseer_foreground_block hook

evidence_items.description: Hook registered in hooks.json as PreToolUse matcher for ^(Edit|Write|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit|Bash)$
evidence_items.evidence: plugins/onex/hooks/hooks.json:73-81 registers pre_tool_use_overseer_foreground_block.sh as the first entry in the PreToolUse chain. jq validation passed.

evidence_items.description: Flag file check: when absent, all tool calls pass through
evidence_items.evidence: Unit test TestFlagAbsent (2 tests) passing in tests/hooks/test_overseer_foreground_block.py. Scratch session scenario 3 confirmed: after `rm overseer-active.flag`, `gh pr merge 123 --auto` passes through with exit 0 and empty JSON response.

evidence_items.description: Flag file present + Bash gh/git mutating commands BLOCKED with exit 2
evidence_items.evidence: test_bash_gh_pr_merge_blocked + test_bash_git_push_blocked passing. Scratch session scenario 1 confirmed: flag present + `gh pr merge 123 --auto` → exit 2, block reason surfaces contract_path (/tmp/scratch.yaml), active_phase (scratch-wave), and `rm <flag>` instructions.

evidence_items.description: Flag file present + Edit targeting $OMNI_HOME BLOCKED
evidence_items.evidence: test_edit_under_omni_home_blocked passing — Edit tool with file_path under $OMNI_HOME returns exit 2 with block decision JSON.

evidence_items.description: Flag file present + Edit targeting paths outside $OMNI_HOME ALLOWED
evidence_items.evidence: test_edit_outside_omni_home_allowed passing — Edit tool targeting /tmp/elsewhere returns exit 0 with empty JSON (pass-through).

evidence_items.description: Read-only tools (Read, Grep, Glob, TaskList, SendMessage) remain allowed when flag present
evidence_items.evidence: test_read_tool_not_in_block_list passing. BLOCK_TOOLS frozenset in overseer_foreground_block.py excludes Read/Grep/Glob/TaskList/SendMessage so the guard early-returns exit 0 before any path check. Scratch session scenario 2 confirmed: flag present + Read → exit 0.

evidence_items.description: Block reason surfaces contract_path and active_phase from YAML flag
evidence_items.evidence: _parse_flag in overseer_foreground_block.py reads YAML without requiring PyYAML. test_parse_flag_extracts_fields + test_parse_flag_missing_fields_returns_defaults passing. Scratch session block reason observed: 'Overseer contract /tmp/scratch.yaml is active on phase scratch-wave. Foreground tool blocked. Escalate via contract halt condition or kill overseer with: rm .../overseer-active.flag'.
uv run pytest tests/hooks/test_overseer_foreground_block.py -v → 11 passed in 0.05s (TestFlagAbsent: 2, TestFlagPresent: 7, TestFlagParsing: 2).
uv run ruff format + ruff check clean. uv run mypy plugins/onex/hooks/lib/overseer_foreground_block.py → Success: no issues found in 1 source file.

Script structure (error-guard, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT resolution, onex-paths sourcing, common.sh PYTHON_CMD, set +e/-e guard around handler, exit 2 on block) follows plugins/onex/hooks/scripts/pre_tool_use_bash_guard.sh verbatim. Python handler mirrors bash_guard.py signature (stdin JSON in, JSON decision out).
PR #1210 merged at 2026-04-11T08:08:30Z, merge commit d79a17ad70934352490e284bbd897d3bbb2b0752. 61 CI checks green, 0 failing, mergeStateStatus CLEAN.

summary: OMN-8376 complete. PreToolUse overseer_foreground_block hook merged via PR #1210. All acceptance criteria verified: flag present blocks Bash/Edit/Write targeting $OMNI_HOME, allows Read/Grep/Glob, surfaces contract_path + active_phase + kill instructions in block reason. 11 unit tests passing. Scratch session smoke test confirmed all 3 acceptance scenarios. Hook activates once the plugin is redeployed.
